name: Tanemon

signature_move.name: Baby Bubble
signature_move.description: Shoots a series of pink bubbles from its mouth at the opponent.

description: A Bulb Digimon with something resembling plant sprout burgeoning from its head. It is a Yuramon that floated around in search of the optimal environment, then settled into the ground and evolved. Due to its extremely timid personality, the moment it senses an intruder's presence, it will burrow into the ground with its four feet and bury its main body beneath the surface. Once it is completely hidden underground, the thing growing from its head camouflages as a plant, allowing it to defend itself from intruders. However, this is ineffective against herbivorous Digimon.
